_meta.purpose: Surfaces where length is justified by content density (multi-sub-claim, citation-heavy, kernel-of-truth load-bearing) rather than technical/mathematical content. Sloppytoppy applies target_max × 2.0 length threshold. Distinct from math-dense (which also disables jargon penalty). PROP-039 length-contextual amendment, Option D hybrid. Curated; sloppytoppy may override with audit trail.
_meta.seed_rationale: Seed based on operator examples in PROP-039 amendment 2 + known-complex citation clusters. Will grow as sloppytoppy's per-surface override records expose patterns.

surfaces.rationale: Van Camp + Mansinha citation cluster with 4+ sub-claims; kernel-of-truth setup for SG eclipse-magnetic prediction
Chinese SG network + Crossley + Kim & Chang citation cluster; 5+ sources, eclipse-magnetic ensemble
Verdict + NOAA NP.xy derivation + cite + post-hoc trap close
Self-Contradicted pattern: false-dilemma framing + Planck reanalysis + WIN-034 copper-firmament cross-ref + carve-out 3-condition close reading
Antarctic gravity: SAA citation cluster + H4 refraction closing + cross-WIN sign-only sweep
Eclipse-magnetic ensemble: 39-eclipse 1991-2016 data, 207 measurements, multi-citation chain
Sub-terrestrial return-channel defender rescue + flux direction (toroidal ring-magnet) + third-horn precision
P7 symmetric test + Chapman-cluster canonicalization + Kim-Chang citation + coverage hedge
SEC-6.14 kappa-cluster: two-horned forced choice, multi-paragraph defender-pivot walkthrough
Timestamp Error tab: OTS canary explanation + technical detail + audience-facing summary, multi-layered

note: Sloppytoppy can ADD to this list at runtime via the operator-audit mechanism: surfaces where Sonnet applied a length override are surfaced in the run summary. If a surface gets overridden 3+ times across runs, operator promotes it to this file. Conversely, if a surface here is overridden as 'too verbose' or stops needing the density, operator removes it. Single source of truth for length-multiplier eligibility.
